subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness unto the oneness of God and His singleness, unto His most excellent names and His most exalted attributes. He is the One Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد المظلوم بوحدانیه الله و فردانیته و باسمائه الحسنی و صفاته العلیا هو الذی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God
